locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: Dry pipe sprinkler system, 20 years old, manufactured by Reliable, NFPA 13 compliant
6 control valves inspected — all found in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare sprinkler heads in cabinet: Yes — adequate supply
deficiencies: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Remove combustible storage located within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors to restore required clearance and ensure proper sprinkler activation and spray pattern.
Correct code violation: repair exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.

overall_assessment.summary: Fire protection system at 8117 Preston Road, Dallas, TX received an overall risk grade of Below Average. The dry pipe sprinkler system passed inspection with adequate water supply; however, two deficiencies were identified: combustible storage improperly placed within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors (priority), and exposed wiring with missing junction box covers in the main electrical room (code violation). Additionally, not all tamper switches on control valves are connected, and minor corrosion was noted on sprinkler heads.
